betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oLets you copy and paste structures.

Press V to change between 'Copy' and 'Paste' mode.

While in 'Copy' mode, Right Click to select the START block to copy and Shift + Right click to select the END block to copy. Shift + Right Click the air to reset or modify a template.

While in 'Paste' mode, Right Click to paste a structure. Shift + Right Click the Air to change the relative positioning of the pasted structure. Press V to rotate or anchor the pasted structure.

You can also load structures from the internet using the template manager and templates.
